# buridan/ui

> Composable, themeable components designed for Reflex. Extend, override, and ship without fighting the framework. Open source. It is built for Reflex using Python. Open Code. AI-ready. It also comes with a command-line tool to install and manage components.

## Overview
- [Introduction](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/introduction): Introduction to the project.
- [Installation](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/installation): How to install and set up the project.
- [CLI](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/cli): How to use the command-line tool.
- [Theming](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/theming): How to customize the theme.
- [Who Is Buridan](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/who-is-buridan): The story behind the name.
- [Changelog](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/changelog): Information about the project's changelog.

## Supplementary Material
- [Charting](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/charting): Guide to using charts.
- [Client State Var](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/client-state-var): Explanation of client state variables.
- [Dashboard](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/dashboard): Overview of the dashboard.
- [Tailwind CN](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/getting-started/tailwind-cn): Using Tailwind CSS with the project.

## Components
- [Accordion](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/accordion): The Accordion component.
- [Area Chart](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/charts/area-chart): The Area Chart component.
- [Avatar](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/avatar): The Avatar component.
- [Badge](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/badge): The Badge component.
- [Bar Chart](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/charts/bar-chart): The Bar Chart component.
- [Breadcrumb](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/breadcrumb): The Breadcrumb component.
- [Button](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/button): The Button component.
- [Checkbox](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/checkbox): The Checkbox component.
- [Collapsible](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/collapsible): The Collapsible component.
- [Context Menu](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/context-menu): The Context Menu component.
- [Dialog](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/dialog): The Dialog component.
- [Doughnut Chart](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/charts/doughnut-chart): The Doughnut Chart component.
- [Input](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/input): The Input component.
- [Input Group](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/input-group): The Input Group component.
- [Kbd](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/kbd): The Kbd component.
- [Line Chart](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/charts/line-chart): The Line Chart component.
- [Link](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/link): The Link component.
- [Menu](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/menu): The Menu component.
- [Pie Chart](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/charts/pie-chart): The Pie Chart component.
- [Popover](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/popover): The Popover component.
- [Radar Chart](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/charts/radar-chart): The Radar Chart component.
- [Scatter Chart](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/charts/scatter-chart): The Scatter Chart component.
- [Scroll Area](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/scroll-area): The Scroll Area component.
- [Select](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/select): The Select component.
- [Skeleton](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/skeleton): The Skeleton component.
- [Slider](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/slider): The Slider component.
- [Tabs](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/tabs): The Tabs component.
- [Textarea](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/textarea): The Textarea component.
- [Theme Switcher](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/theme-switcher): The Theme Switcher component.
- [Toggle](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/toggle): The Toggle component.
- [Toggle Group](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/toggle-group): The Toggle Group component.
- [Tooltip](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/tooltip): The Tooltip component.
- [Typography](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/components/typography): The Typography component.

## Integrations
- [Fuse Js](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/javascript-integrations/fuse-js): Integration with Fuse.js.
- [Minisearch Js](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/javascript-integrations/minisearch-js): Integration with Minisearch.js.
- [Quill Js](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/javascript-integrations/quill-js): Integration with Quill.js.
- [React Countup](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/wrapped-components/react-countup): Integration with React Countup.
- [React Spinner](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/wrapped-components/react-spinner): Integration with React Spinner.
- [React Typed](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/wrapped-components/react-typed): Integration with React Typed.
- [Simple Icon](https://buridan-ui.reflex.run/docs/wrapped-components/simple-icon): Integration with Simple Icon.
